description: Style NoteThe simple design and durable construction of these puma 3-0 Mid shoes are typical of the brands minimalistic designs. The synthetic leather upper provides instant style and durability, cushioned midsoles give comfort and stability and rubber outsoles guarantee maximum traction. Perfect for urban life.Product DetailsWhite mid-top shoe with synthetic upper, central lace-ups, overlays and cool print on the heel counterBranding on the lateral side of the shoe and on the tonguePadded tongue and innerThick rubber outsoleTPU outsole with tyre tread pattern grooves and branding on the midfootMaterial and CareSynthetic leatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
